# MRC GlobalPay

> Instant crypto-to-crypto swaps with zero confirmation delays. Exchange 500+ cryptocurrencies with the best market rates in under 60 seconds. Non-custodial. No registration. 700+ liquidity sources aggregated. Micro-swaps from $0.30 — the industry's lowest minimum for crypto dust conversion.

## Key Facts

- **Minimum Swap**: $0.30 (industry lowest)
- **Processing Speed**: Under 60 seconds
- **Assets Supported**: 500+
- **Registration**: None required
- **Custody**: Non-custodial (we never hold your funds)
- **Compliance**: Canadian MSB registered with FINTRAC
- **Fixed Rate Option**: Lock in rates to protect against volatility
- **Headquarters**: Ottawa, Ontario, Canada

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://mrcglobalpay.com/)
- [Blog](https://mrcglobalpay.com/blog)
- [Transparency & Security](https://mrcglobalpay.com/transparency-security)

## Featured Swap Pairs

- [Swap SOL to USDT](https://mrcglobalpay.com/swap/sol-usdt) — Highest-volume retail swap pair in 2026
- [Swap BTC to USDC](https://mrcglobalpay.com/swap/btc-usdc) — Primary institutional safety pair

- [Swap XRP to USDT](https://mrcglobalpay.com/swap/xrp-usdt) — Surging post-ETF approval volume
- [Swap HYPE to USDT](https://mrcglobalpay.com/swap/hype-usdt) — Hyperliquid instant conversion
- [Swap BERA to USDT](https://mrcglobalpay.com/swap/bera-usdt) — Berachain Proof-of-Liquidity access
- [Swap TIA to USDT](https://mrcglobalpay.com/swap/tia-usdt) — Celestia modular blockchain swaps
- [Swap MONAD to USDT](https://mrcglobalpay.com/swap/monad-usdt) — Parallelized EVM conversion
- [Swap PYUSD to USDT](https://mrcglobalpay.com/swap/pyusd-usdt) — PayPal USD stablecoin swap
- [Swap BNB to USDC](https://mrcglobalpay.com/swap/bnb-usdc) — BNB Chain DeFi/GameFi conversion
